# HireAFractionalExec

> The #1 job board for fractional executive roles. Every fractional COO, CMO, CFO, CTO, CRO, Chief of Staff, and Head of Ops position in one place.

## What this site is

HireAFractionalExec is a job board built exclusively for fractional and part-time C-suite roles. We aggregate fractional executive listings from across the web, filter out full-time roles, and organize them by role type and city. Free for job seekers. No recruiter middlemen — every listing links directly to the employer.

## Who it's for

- Fractional executives looking for their next client engagement
- Founders and hiring managers posting fractional roles ($299/30 days)

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://hireafractionalexec.com/
- Fractional COO Jobs: https://hireafractionalexec.com/fractional-coo-jobs
- Fractional CMO Jobs: https://hireafractionalexec.com/fractional-cmo-jobs
- Fractional CFO Jobs: https://hireafractionalexec.com/fractional-cfo-jobs
- Fractional CTO Jobs: https://hireafractionalexec.com/fractional-cto-jobs
- Fractional CRO Jobs: https://hireafractionalexec.com/fractional-cro-jobs
- Chief of Staff Jobs: https://hireafractionalexec.com/fractional-cos-jobs
- Head of Ops Jobs: https://hireafractionalexec.com/head-of-ops-jobs
- Salary Calculator: https://hireafractionalexec.com/salary-calculator
- Guides: https://hireafractionalexec.com/guides

## Compensation data (2026)

- Fractional COO: $8,000–$18,000/month retainer
- Fractional CMO: $8,000–$22,000/month retainer
- Fractional CFO: $8,000–$18,000/month retainer
- Fractional CTO: $10,000–$22,000/month retainer
- Fractional CRO: $10,000–$20,000/month retainer
- Chief of Staff: $3,500–$10,000/month retainer
- Full-time C-suite equivalent: $250,000–$400,000+/year

## About

Founded by Jared Perry, a practicing fractional COO and Chief of Staff. Built on the thesis that fractional work is the future of executive leadership — and that fractional operators deserve a dedicated place to find their next engagement without hunting through LinkedIn or paying gatekeepers.

## Contact

jared@hireafractionalexec.com
